sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113024" key="xali/frwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χᾰλί-φρων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ονος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">χάλις</etym>) <sense id="n113024.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">light-minded, thoughtless,</tr_> joined with <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">νήπιος,</foreign> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0012.tlg002.perseus-grc1:4:371" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.371</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0012.tlg002.perseus-grc1:19:530" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">19.530</biblScope> </bibl>; of Dionysus (cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χάλις</foreign>), <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.524.23</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n113024.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of yielding temper, pliable,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">χ. νεύματα κούρης</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0576.tlg001:117" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Musae.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">117</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
